name: 炮灰女配不内耗，反派老公往上靠
original_name: 炮灰女配不内耗，反派老公往上靠
overview: Guan Yu reads a book and becomes the short-lived wife of the villain Ji Jinzhou. After being bound to the evil girl system, she works her own way to earn health points to extend her life. Unexpectedly, Ji Jinzhou is truly attracted by her evil deeds. The distance between the two is also gradually getting closer. In the end, they broke the shackles of the plot and broke through the plot to gain a happy ending.

trailers.title: [MULTI SUB] The Villain Couple Slays【Full】Married the villain, then became his greatest plot twist
